DryCheckConfig.docs: Infrastructure-layer loaded configuration for the dry-check gate. Reads `.harness/config/dry-check.json` via `load(path)`. Internal representation has all-private fields; the public API is accessors only. After this track: schema_version 4 exclusively (CN-05), `enabled: bool` accessor added (D2/IN-05), and `fast_reasoning_effort()` / `final_reasoning_effort()` accessors removed (D4/IN-09). The private serde DTO (`DryCheckConfigDto`) is internal to this module and is not catalogued.

DryCheckConfigError.docs: Error variants from DryCheckConfig::load. After D4: `InvalidReasoningEffort` variant is removed because reasoning effort validation moves to agent-profiles.json / composition root. `InvalidPercent` and other variants remain.

CapabilityConfigDto.docs: Serde DTO for a single capability entry in `.harness/config/agent-profiles.json`. After D4: `fast_reasoning_effort` and `final_reasoning_effort` fields are added to hold the reasoning effort for the fast-round and final-round dry-checker. Both fields are `Option<String>` (absent = no override; caller uses a built-in default). All string fields are untyped in this DTO — value validation is the responsibility of the composition root (OS-06/IN-08). The `String` type for capability-level strings is justified as unvalidated Dto accessor values per infrastructure Dto convention (R9: not raw primitive for a domain concept; these are tool configuration strings with no cross-domain identity).

methods.name: load
methods.docs: Load dry-check configuration from a JSON file. After D4: accepts schema_version 4 only (rejects all others with UnsupportedSchemaVersion). Parses `enabled` boolean (default false when absent). Does NOT parse or validate `fast_reasoning_effort` / `final_reasoning_effort` — those fields are now in agent-profiles.json.

methods.name: enabled
methods.docs: Returns whether the DRY gate is enabled. Added by D2/IN-05.

methods.name: threshold
methods.docs: Returns the similarity threshold from the loaded configuration.

methods.name: max_parallelism
methods.docs: Returns the raw max_parallelism usize from the loaded JSON. Returns a raw primitive because this is the infrastructure Dto layer; the composition root lifts it into the validated DryCheckParallelism newtype (R9: raw primitive justified as unvalidated Dto accessor).

methods.name: known_bad_injection_rate_percent
methods.docs: Returns the raw known_bad_injection_rate_percent u8 from the loaded JSON. Raw primitive: infrastructure Dto accessor; composition root lifts it into DryCheckPercent (R9: Dto layer unvalidated value).

methods.name: known_bad_detection_threshold_percent
methods.docs: Returns the raw known_bad_detection_threshold_percent u8 from the loaded JSON. Raw primitive: infrastructure Dto accessor; composition root lifts it into DryCheckPercent (R9: Dto layer unvalidated value).

methods.name: fingerprint_with_threshold
methods.docs: Compute a SHA-256 fingerprint using the given effective threshold in place of self.threshold. After D4: encoding excludes fast_reasoning_effort / final_reasoning_effort (CN-08/IN-10).

methods.name: fingerprint
methods.docs: Compute a SHA-256 fingerprint using self.threshold as the effective threshold.

methods.name: model
methods.docs: The default model name, if set.

methods.name: fast_provider
methods.docs: The fast-round provider override, if set.

methods.name: fast_model
methods.docs: The fast-round model override, if set.

methods.name: prompt_template_path
methods.docs: The prompt template path for this capability, if set.

methods.name: fast_reasoning_effort
methods.docs: The fast-round reasoning effort for this capability, if set. Added by D4/IN-08. Unvalidated string; value validation is performed by the composition root (OS-06).

methods.name: final_reasoning_effort
methods.docs: The final-round reasoning effort for this capability, if set. Added by D4/IN-08. Unvalidated string; value validation is performed by the composition root (OS-06).
